summary: Swyx frames the concept of 'loopcraft' as the core skill AI engineering: higher levels of abstraction for leverage and lower levels for debugging. The 'highest loop' occurs when humans collaborate on applying technology and improving civilization.
key_lesson: Humans must come together to design and debug all the layers of loops as AI Engineering is expanding to many vertical domains.
evidence: a core skill of AI engineer is defining what loops you're working in and figuring out whether that's the right level of abstraction
when you're ready going up a loop in order to figure out the next level in productivity and scaling
when you're finding issues going down a loop and going lower level in order to figure out reliability and fixing whatever bugs you you find
it's up to you to decide and route yourself as to which level you currently working at and which level you're currently blocked on
the broader project of the human civilization and what we're building with collective intelligence
this is the year that we're adding vertical tracks like you know AI in healthcare, AI in finance, AI in GTM we have a four deployed engineering tracks
all of this is meant to see how AI is just diffusing finally beyond coding.
the highest loop of all which is the world's fair which is the summit of summits.
action_items: Audit an existing or planned AI workflow to 'loop levels' and identify if you're stuck at the wrong level.
Find other humans to learn and improve your shared 'loopcraft'.
